tagline: Your sign. Your medicine. Your stones.
description: One kit per sun sign — each contains the ruling planet's Sacred Botanical tea, featured crystal (polished, tumbled), a printed mini Blueprint card with your sign's Hz frequency, plant ally, and body placement guide, and a sealed keepsake pouch.
variants: 12 variants — one per sun sign (Aries through Pisces)
contents: Sacred Botanical herb (ruling planet) — 1 oz dried, sealed
Mini Blueprint Card — printed, sign-specific: Hz frequency, plant ally, crystal, body placement
QR code linking to the user's Astryx blueprint
appIntegration: When user views their Cosmic Blueprint, a 'Shop Your Kit' card appears below Plant Allies with their sign-specific kit. One-click to sacredtea.net product page.

tagline: Four lotus. Five planets. One sacred lineage.
description: The complete Lotus Spectrum — all four lotus varieties (Red, White, Blue, Egyptian Blue) as individual dried flower packets, plus four corresponding crystals (one per lotus), a Lotus Planetary Matrix card, and a four-cup brewing & intention guide.
contents: Egyptian Blue Lotus flowers — 0.5 oz dried (Neptune)
Four crystal set: Red Jasper, Moonstone, Lapis Lazuli, Labradorite (all tumbled)
Lotus Planetary Matrix card — full color, laminated
Brewing & Intention Guide — brewing temps, intentions, safety notes
appIntegration: Featured in the Plant Allies tab as 'The Lotus Collection — cross-planetary medicine.' Visible to all users regardless of sign. Prominent in the Welcome Screen shop section.

tagline: The full system. For the professional practitioner.
description: The complete physical toolkit for Astryx-certified practitioners — 7 planetary Sacred Botanical teas, 7 planetary crystals, a full-color Practitioner Body Layout Map, and a Sacred Tones Session Guide card listing all 13 planetary Hz frequencies and bone application points.
contents: 7 Sacred Botanical teas — one per traditional planet (Sun through Saturn): Red Lotus, White Lotus, Lavender, Rose, Red Hibiscus, Blue Lotus, Horsetail (0.5 oz each)
7 featured crystals — one per traditional planet: Amber, Moonstone, Blue Lace Agate, Rose Quartz, Bloodstone, Lapis Lazuli, Shungite (all polished, tumbled)
Practitioner Body Layout Map — full-color, laminated, 8.5x11 — shows crystal placement points over body outline
Sacred Tones Session Guide card — all 13 planetary Hz, bone application points, vagal strength indicators
Velvet or linen storage pouch for crystals
Wooden or bamboo herb storage box
QR code to Astryx Practitioner Portal
appIntegration: Promoted in Practitioner Portal dashboard as 'Complete your practice with the physical toolkit.' Shown in Session Mode alongside Sacred Tones fork map. Link in PDF Blueprint Report footer.

tagline: Nine master plants. Nine planetary medicines.
description: All nine Sacred Botanicals as individual tea samples — the complete cross-planetary botanical library in one collection. Includes brewing guide and planetary correspondence card.
contents: Sacred Botanicals Brewing Guide — temperatures, timing, intentions, safety
appIntegration: Accessible from all blueprint views as 'Explore the full Sacred Botanicals collection.' Primary upsell for individual users who want to go deeper.
